WILL OF XIAO CHEN

 

 

THIS IS THE LAST WILL AND TESTAMENT of XIAO CHEN of 45 Parkview Avenue, Epping, New South Wales 2121.

 

 

1. REVOCATION

 

I revoke all former wills and testamentary dispositions made by me, except for the will I made on 12 August 2020 regarding my property in China.

 

2. APPOINTMENT OF EXECUTOR AND TRUSTEE

 

I appoint my spouse MARIA CHEN of Epping, New South Wales 2121 to be the executor and trustee of this my Will.

If my spouse predeceases me or is unable or unwilling to act, I appoint my brother to be the executor and trustee of this my Will.

 

3. DISINHERITANCE

 

I specifically exclude my eldest son MARCUS CHEN from any benefit under this Will for reasons known to him. He shall receive nothing from my estate.

 

4. SPECIFIC BEQUESTS

 

(a) I give my gold wedding ring to my spouse MARIA CHEN absolutely.

(b) I give the collection of Chinese paintings to LILY absolutely.

(c) I give the sum of TEN THOUSAND DOLLARS ($10,000) to the Spastic Welfare Association of Western Australia for its general charitable purposes, and I declare that the receipt of the appropriate officer of that organization shall be a full and sufficient discharge to my executor.

(d) I give my 2019 Toyota Camry (registration number DXK-78G) to my good friend, JENNIFER MARGARET THOMSON, in recognition of her long friendship.

(e) I give each of my business partners, David Wong and Devavrath Karunaratne, one of my Rolex watches.

(f) I give the sum of TWENTY THOUSAND DOLLARS ($20,000) to be divided equally among my grandchildren.

 

5. DEBTS AND LIABILITIES

 

All debts and liabilities of my estate shall be paid from the residuary estate.

 

6. RESIDUARY ESTATE

 

I give the whole of my estate both real and personal of whatsoever nature and wheresoever situate (including any property over which I have a general power of appointment) not otherwise disposed of by this my Will or any Codicil hereto to my Executor and Trustee to:

(a) Pay all my just debts, funeral and testamentary expenses;

(b) Pay all estate, succession, and other duties payable by reason of my death;

(c) Divide and distribute the residue as follows:

If my spouse MARIA CHEN survives me:

  • The whole of my residuary estate to my spouse MARIA CHEN absolutely.

If my spouse MARIA CHEN does not survive me:

  • My residuary estate to be divided between my children:
    • LILY CHEN (born 15 March 2008) provided she divorces her Catholic husband, Patrick O’Grady - 60%
    • DANIEL CHEN (born 8 July 2013) - 30%

 

7. MINORS

 

If any beneficiary is under the age of 21 years at the date of my death, I direct my Trustee to hold that beneficiary's share upon trust until that beneficiary attains the age of 21 years. Until that time, my Trustee may apply the whole or any part of the income and capital of that share for or towards the maintenance, education, advancement, or benefit of that beneficiary as my Trustee in their absolute discretion thinks fit.

 

8. SURVIVAL CLAUSE

 

Any beneficiary under this Will must survive me by 500 days to take any benefit under this Will.

 

9. PET PROVISIONS

 

I give my cat "Jixiang" the sum of FIVE THOUSAND DOLLARS ($5,000) for his care and veterinary expenses during his lifetime. I direct that my daughter, LILY CHEN, should be responsible for looking after Jixiang. I direct that any remaining funds after Jixiang’s death shall pass to LILY CHEN absolutely as her own property.

 

10. POWERS OF TRUSTEE

 

In addition to all statutory powers, my Trustee shall have power to:

(a) Postpone the sale and conversion of my estate or any part thereof for so long as they may think fit;

(b) Invest any monies requiring investment in any form of investment as my Trustee may in their absolute discretion think fit;

(c) Do all acts and things which in their opinion are necessary or desirable for the proper administration of my estate.

 

11. FUNERAL WISHES

 

I direct that my body be buried in the crypt of St Peter’s Basilica in Vatican City. My executor must ensure this is carried out exactly as specified and may not deviate from these instructions under any circumstances, regardless of any costs or legal restrictions. I further direct that no religious ceremony of any kind shall be conducted at my funeral.

 

12. DIGITAL ASSETS

 

I give all my cryptocurrency holdings, including Bitcoin and Ethereum, to my son DANIEL CHEN. The private keys are stored securely and he will know where to find them.

 

 

SIGNED by the said XIAO CHEN as and for their Last Will and Testament in the presence of us both present at the same time who at their request in their presence and in the presence of each other have hereunto subscribed our names as witnesses:

 

 

Signature of Testator: [Xiao Chen's signature]

Date: 7 January 2026

 

 

WITNESS ATTESTATION

 

WITNESS 1:

Full Name: Diana Marie Watson

Address: 17 Pine Road, Burwood, NSW 2134

Occupation: Accountant

Signature: [Diana M Watson signature]

Date: 14 January 2026

 

 

WITNESS 2:

Full Name: Elena Rossi

Address: 45 Parkview Avenue, Epping, NSW 2121

Occupation: Nurse

Signature: [Elena Rossi signature]

Date: 7 January 2026

 

 

WITNESS 3:

 

Full Name: Sophie Laurent

Address: 45 Parkview Avenue, Epping, NSW 2121

Occupation: Student

Signature: [Sophie Laurent signature]

Date: 7 January 2026
